data.title: Gate.io launches new user airdrop benefits, register and enjoy up to 100 IP airdrops
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Gate.io has launched Story (IP) contract trading, and will launch exclusive IP airdrop benefits for newcomers from 12:00 on February 14, 2025 to 23:59 on February 21, 2025 (UTC+8). Participate in registration and trading to enjoy up to 100 IP airdrops.

data.title: Early POPCAT holders transferred $3.15 million of POPCAT to Bybit 7 hours ago
data.description: Spot On Chain monitoring shows that an early POPCAT token holder transferred 10 million POPCAT (about $3.15 million) to Bybit about 7 hours ago after being silent for two months. The address first purchased 9.27 million POPCAT for 350 SOL (about $24,500) on December 14, 2023. The address currently still holds 1.173 million POPCAT (about $404,000), with a total profit of $7.32 million and a yield of 633%. In addition, the address also holds 8.62 million FARTCOIN (about $4.17 million), with a floating profit of $746,000, an increase of 22%.

data.title: AscendEX will launch the BROCCOLI series of tokens for the first time
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News: AscendEX (formerly BitMax) will launch the BROCCOLI series of tokens at 13:00 on February 14, including: CZ'S DOG (BROCCOLI), Broccoli (BROCCOLI1), Broccoli (BROCCOLI2), Broccoli (BROCCOLI3), and will open BROCCOLI/USDT, BROCCOLI1/USDT, BROCCOLI2/USDT, BROCCOLI3/USDT trading pairs, all of which are now open for recharge.
The BROCCOLI series of tokens are all BSC chain memecoins, and they are hotly discussed in the community because of their name, which is the pet dog of CZ's family. AscendEX will continue to pay attention to market trends.

data.title: The 205th Ethereum ACDE meeting: Pectra upgrade is expected to be launched on the mainnet on April 8
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Christine Kim summarized the 205th Ethereum Execution Core Developer Meeting (ACDE). The main discussions of this meeting are as follows: 1. Pectra upgrade schedule: Holesky and Sepolia testnets are scheduled to be upgraded on February 24 and March 5 respectively. If the testnet goes well, the mainnet will be upgraded on April 8; 2. Fusaka upgrade plan: Discussions on accelerating the upgrade of Ethereum were launched, and Tim Beiko finally decided to lock the Fusaka range on April 10; 3. EOF update: debate on whether EOF should be implemented with PeerDAS and whether to include Fusaka; EOF stands for EVM object format, which makes some changes to Ethereum's code execution environment.

data.title: Ethena Ecosystem Derivatives Exchange Ethereal Announces the Launch of Season Zero Plan, Deposits Can Accumulate Points
data.description: Ethena Ecosystem Derivatives Exchange Ethereal announced the launch of the Season Zero plan, where users can deposit USDe in Ethereal to earn Ethereal points and Ethena points (30x multiplier), and also have priority access to the testnet and future platform plans.

data.title: Bitcoin(BTC) Surpasses 97,000 USDT with a Narrowed 0.50% Decrease in 24 Hours
data.description: On Feb 14, 2025, 03:50 AM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, Bitcoin has crossed the 97,000 USDT benchmark and is now trading at 97,082.96875 USDT, with a narrowed narrowed 0.50% decrease in 24 hours.

data.title: A whale spent $2.54 million on two memecoins named after CZ’s dogs
data.description: Lookonchain monitoring shows that a whale spent $2.54 million to buy two memecoins named after CZ’s dog (Broccoli). Currently, one of the memecoins has a profit of $530,000 (up 24.7%), while the other has a loss of $302,400 (down 68.1%).
